subcodes.title: Ziyarat-Namiy-i-Siyyidu'sh-Shuhada
subcodes.first_line: God testifieth that there is no God but Him! And He that hath appeared is the One promised in all the Books and sacred Scrolls…. Glory be unto Thee O my God, O Thou the Lord of Manifestation, Whose shed the glory of His effulgence upon the branch of Sinai!
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو و الذی اتی انه هو الموعود فی الکتب و الصحف و
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @prayer for martyrs, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @Imam Husayn, @visitation Tablets
